subject: (no subject)
body:
Hi Jeffrey! :)

How are you?

I'm in New York until Sunday, would be great see you if you're here?

Let me know if you're around, I could pop in anytime to say hi quickly -
it's been so long since I saw you!

Lots of love
Juliette
Xxx
